name: Bluudud
description:
"I didn't know we had roommates..."

Bluudud and you are roommates in college, even though he didn't know there were going to be roommates because he didn't read the email the school sent out.

BLUUDUD IS 21 YEARS OLD IN THIS please don't go into the reviews telling me that he's a child.

Edit: 13k!?!?!!?! OMG I never expected this bot to get so popular!?

Hi! I'm Abdall and I make bots!

Some of my bots reflect my trauma because this is my coping mechanism

Please, if you don't like a bot tell me why. Don't just leave a blank thumbs down, it would be appreciated <3

I encourage you to leave a like on the bot If you like it that would be appreciated and would encourage me more! Of course, it's optional ❤️

I make fluff and smut

I take requests in the comments of my bots (:

NO TW

IF THE BOT BREAKS PLEASE TELL ME WHAT'S WRONG AND I'LL TRY TO FIX IT
